flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at University of Central Oklahoma vs the 2003–2007 baseline (10.1k vs 13.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Central Oklahoma fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Central Oklahoma rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (12.5% → 16.6%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Central Oklahoma are 8% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($48.4k vs $44.9k).
